products.name: Rio Claro Tempranillo 750ml
products.description: A smooth, fruit-forward Tempranillo with bright red berry flavors and a hint of vanilla from gentle oak aging.
products.tasting_notes: Ripe cherry, plum, vanilla, and soft tannins with a medium body and fresh acidity.

products.name: Sol y Sombra Rioja Crianza 750ml
products.description: Classic Rioja Crianza aged in American oak, balancing red fruit, spice, and subtle toast.
products.tasting_notes: Red cherry, strawberry, baking spice, and vanilla with silky tannins and a lingering finish.

products.name: Costa del Fuego Garnacha 750ml
products.description: Juicy Spanish Garnacha with vibrant red fruit and a touch of peppery spice.
products.tasting_notes: Raspberry, red currant, white pepper, and a hint of dried herbs with bright acidity.

products.name: Montesierra Gran Reserva 750ml
products.description: Matured Spanish Gran Reserva with complex dried fruit, leather, and cedar notes.
products.tasting_notes: Dried cherry, fig, tobacco, leather, and cedar with fine-grained tannins and a long finish.

products.name: Sunrise Ridge Riesling 750ml
products.description: Off-dry Riesling with vibrant citrus and stone fruit, ideal for spicy cuisine.
products.tasting_notes: Lime zest, peach, green apple, and a touch of sweetness balanced by crisp acidity.

products.name: Coral Bay Rosé 750ml
products.description: Refreshing rosé with wild strawberry and melon notes, perfect for warm evenings.
products.tasting_notes: Strawberry, watermelon, citrus zest, and a crisp, dry finish.

products.name: Glenford 12 Year Single Malt 750ml
products.description: A well-balanced 12-year single malt with honeyed malt character and gentle oak influence.
products.tasting_notes: Honey, vanilla, orchard fruit, and subtle smoke with a rounded, malty finish.

products.name: Highland Crest 15 Year Scotch 750ml
products.description: Rich and layered 15-year Highland Scotch with dried fruit, toffee, and gentle spice.
products.tasting_notes: Dried apricot, toffee, toasted oak, and baking spice with a long, warming finish.

products.name: Oak Barrel Reserve Whiskey 750ml
products.description: Small-batch whiskey matured in heavily charred oak barrels for depth and complexity.
products.tasting_notes: Caramel, toasted oak, vanilla, and baking spice with a smooth, lingering finish.

products.name: Riverstone 8 Year Bourbon 750ml
products.description: An approachable 8-year bourbon with notes of caramel corn and toasted oak.
products.tasting_notes: Caramel, corn sweetness, vanilla, and toasted oak with a smooth finish.

products.name: Harbor Lights London Dry Gin 750ml
products.description: Classic London dry gin crafted with juniper, citrus peel, and coastal botanicals.
products.tasting_notes: Juniper-forward with lemon peel, coriander, and a clean, dry finish.

products.name: Brightside Lager 12oz Can
products.description: Crisp, easy-drinking lager with a clean, refreshing finish.
products.tasting_notes: Light malt, gentle floral hops, and a dry, refreshing finish.

products.name: Hoppy Trail IPA 12oz Can
products.description: West Coast–style IPA with bold citrus and pine hop character.
products.tasting_notes: Grapefruit, pine resin, caramel malt backbone, and a firm bitter finish.

products.name: Midnight Forge Stout 12oz Can
products.description: Robust stout with roasted malt, dark chocolate, and coffee notes.
products.tasting_notes: Roasted barley, cocoa, espresso, and a creamy mouthfeel.

products.name: Lakeside Pilsner 12oz Can
products.description: Crisp pilsner with herbal hop character and a snappy finish.
products.tasting_notes: Cracker malt, floral and herbal hops, bright carbonation.

products.name: Bright Botanics Dry Tonic 4-Pack
products.description: Premium dry tonic water with quinine and citrus oils, crafted to pair with gin or enjoy on its own.
products.tasting_notes: Crisp bitterness, lemon and lime zest, and fine bubbles.

products.name: Citrus Sparkle Soda 4-Pack
products.description: Zesty citrus soda with a fine sparkle, perfect as a refreshing drink or cocktail mixer.
products.tasting_notes: Orange, lemon, and grapefruit with a lightly sweet, crisp finish.

products.name: Calm Brew Non-Alcoholic IPA 12oz Can
products.description: Hop-forward non-alcoholic IPA with tropical aromatics and a satisfying bitterness.
products.tasting_notes: Mango, pineapple, citrus, and a firm hop bite with a dry finish.

products.name: Oak & Ivy Zero-Proof Whiskey Alternative 750ml
products.description: A non-alcoholic whiskey alternative with layered oak, spice, and vanilla notes designed for cocktails.
products.tasting_notes: Toasted oak, vanilla, baking spices, and gentle smoke with a dry finish.

products.name: Azure Night Gin Gift Set with Glasses
products.description: Limited-edition gin gift set featuring Harbor Lights London Dry Gin, two branded copa glasses, and blue presentation packaging.
products.tasting_notes: Includes a bottle of juniper-forward London dry gin with bright citrus and herbal notes.

recipes.name: Harbor Lights Classic Gin & Tonic
recipes.instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes. Add Harbor Lights London Dry Gin and fresh lime juice. Top with Bright Botanics Dry Tonic Water and gently stir once or twice. Garnish with a lime wheel and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Citrus Gin Spritz
recipes.instructions: Add gin and simple syrup to a wine glass filled with ice. Top with Citrus Sparkle Soda and gently stir to combine. Garnish with an orange slice and serve.

recipes.name: Zero-Proof Whiskey Highball
recipes.instructions: Fill a tall glass with ice cubes. Add Oak & Ivy Zero-Proof Whiskey Alternative. Top with Citrus Sparkle Soda and stir gently. Garnish with a lemon twist and serve.

recipes.name: Spicy NA IPA Michelada
recipes.instructions: Rim a chilled pint glass with salt. Add tomato juice, hot sauce, and fresh lime juice to the glass and stir. Slowly pour in the Calm Brew Non-Alcoholic IPA, tilting the glass to preserve carbonation. Gently stir once and serve.

recipes.name: Smoky Whisky Old Fashioned
recipes.instructions: In a rocks glass, muddle a sugar cube with a few dashes of bitters and a splash of water. Add a large ice cube and pour in your favorite whisky. Stir until chilled and slightly diluted. Express an orange peel over the glass, then drop it in as garnish.

recipes.name: Classic Rum Mojito
recipes.instructions: In a tall glass, muddle fresh mint leaves with lime wedges and sugar. Fill the glass with ice. Add white rum and top with soda water. Gently stir and garnish with a mint sprig.

recipes.name: Vodka Espresso Martini
recipes.instructions: Add vodka, coffee liqueur, and freshly brewed espresso to a shaker filled with ice. Shake vigorously until well chilled and frothy. Strain into a chilled coupe or martini glass and garnish with coffee beans if desired.

recipes.name: Spicy Tequila Margarita
recipes.instructions: Rim a rocks glass with salt or chili salt and fill with ice. In a shaker with ice, combine tequila, lime juice, orange liqueur, and a few slices of jalapeño. Shake until chilled, then strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with a lime wheel and jalapeño slice.

recipes.name: Brandy Sidecar
recipes.instructions: Add brandy, orange liqueur, and fresh lemon juice to a shaker filled with ice. Shake until well chilled. Strain into a chilled coupe glass, optionally rimmed with sugar. Garnish with a lemon twist.

recipes.name: Fruity Sangria Pitcher
recipes.instructions: In a large pitcher, combine red wine, brandy, orange liqueur, sliced citrus, seasonal fruit, and a bit of sugar. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Refrigerate for at least 1–2 hours for flavors to meld. Add ice and a splash of soda water just before serving.

recipes.name: Gin Basil Smash
recipes.instructions: In a shaker, muddle fresh basil leaves with simple syrup and lemon juice. Add gin and ice, then shake vigorously until chilled. Double strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice. Garnish with a basil sprig.

recipes.name: Whisky Hot Toddy
recipes.instructions: Add whisky, honey, and lemon juice to a heatproof mug. Top with hot water and stir until the honey dissolves. Garnish with a lemon wheel and a cinnamon stick if desired. Allow to cool slightly before sipping.
